Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SamplerId enumeration is an opaque token identifying a separate sampler resource reflected from an IShaderProgram. It is used when the device and renderer support separate texture sampler bindings.

Note.Paragraph: ID values are renderer-generated tokens. Applications should obtain them from shader reflection methods rather than constructing arbitrary values.

EnumMemberList.EnumMemberListEntry: Indicates that no matching sampler resource was found or that no sampler binding slot is selected.
